text: Being here, I am struck by the quiet, almost clinical ambiance of this corridor. The angled perspective disorients me, making me question my own sense of orientation, both in space and in thought. The presence of emergency equipment is a stark reminder of safety and contingency, yet the emptiness imbues the place with a sense of anticipation or even mild unease. I feel suspended between movement and stillness, as if waiting for meaning to emerge from the structured sterility around me.
